examples: She became a leading promoter of European integration.
Aaron Copland was always the most energetic promoter of American music.
The effect of IGFBP-3 on the growth hormone promoter activity stimulated by triiodothyronine was determined by dual-luciferase reporter assay.
Suppose you become so besotted with hosting games that you want to become a for-profit promoter.
This week, I find myself unable to be much of a promoter for the trade.
